initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN circuits.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_german_races
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE circuits.country IN ('Germany', 'France', 'United Kingdom', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Monaco', 'Belgium', 'Netherlands', 'Austria', 'Switzerland', 'Portugal', 'Sweden', 'Finland', 'Denmark', 'Norway', 'Greece', 'Turkey');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN circuits.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_german_races
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE circuits.country IN ('Germany', 'France', 'United Kingdom', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Monaco', 'Belgium', 'Netherlands', 'Austria', 'Switzerland', 'Portugal', 'Sweden', 'Finland', 'Denmark', 'Norway', 'Greece', 'Turkey');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN circuits.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE circuits.country IN ('Germany', 'France', 'United Kingdom', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Monaco', 'Belgium', 'Netherlands', 'Austria', 'Switzerland', 'Portugal', 'Sweden', 'Finland', 'Denmark', 'Norway', 'Greece', 'Turkey');
